pool.baseline: The candle flickers low, much like the embers of my own soul. He is gone, and with him, the very sun has set upon my heart. There is no warmth left in this world, only this suffocating, grey stillness. I feel as though I am already a ghost, haunting a life that no longer belongs to me. Why must the dawn always come to remind us of what we have lost? It feels... right... to simply let the shadows take me. To fade away into the velvet blackness where the pain cannot reach.
